zh.lifeSummary: 當Perna Caetani於1178年出生在義大利時，她的父親Giovanni Caetani20歲，母親Caetani34歲。她於1201年與Matteo Rosso Orsini在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1216年在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年38歲。

zh-hans.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: 意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Perna Caetani于1178年出生在意大利时，她的父亲Giovanni Caetani20岁，母亲Caetani34岁。她于1201年与Matteo Rosso Orsini在意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1216年在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Caetani
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Ana, Luis, Abilio, Ademar, Agusto, Alfredo, Alvaro, Enrique, Fernando.  Portuguese Joaquim, Duarte, Joao, Paulo, Vasco.  Italian Antonio, Angelo.
Portuguese and Spanish: from the personal name Caietano, an equivalent of Italian Gaetano .

variants.name: Gaetano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Dino, Francesco, Giovanni, Mauro, Nunzio, Pasquale, Primo, Rocco, Sal, Silvio.

Italian: from the personal name Gaetano, medieval Latin Caietanus, originally a Latin ethnic name denoting someone from Caieta in Latium (now Gaeta). According to legend the place was named after the elderly nurse of Aeneas, who died there after fleeing with him from the ruins of Troy. The name persisted among early Christians and was popular in the Middle Ages. The religious reformer Saint Gaetano (1480–1547) was born in Vicenza, a member of a Venetian noble family. He is not to be confused with his contemporary Cardinal Gaetano, an active opponent of Martin Luther.

nameMeanings.name: Perna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: name coined in the latter part of the 19th century, perhaps as a contracted form of   Verena   or   Verona  , or as a feminine form of   Vernon .

en.lifeSummary: When Perna Caetani was born in 1178, in Italy, her father, Giovanni Caetani, was 20 and her mother, Caetani, was 34. She married Matteo Rosso Orsini in 1201, in Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1216, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Perna Caetani est née en 1178, à Italie, son père, Giovanni Caetani, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Caetani, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Matteo Rosso Orsini en 1201, à Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1216, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 매그나노 인 리비라
ko.lifeSummary: Perna Caetani(이)가 1178년 이탈리아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giovanni Caetani(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Caetani(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1201년 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 매그나노 인 리비라에서 Matteo Rosso Orsini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1216년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Perna Caetani nasceu em 1178, em Itália, seu pai, Giovanni Caetani, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Caetani, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Matteo Rosso Orsini em 1201, em Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: магнано ин ривиира, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Perna Caetani родилась в 1178 г. в местности Италия, её отцу по имени Giovanni Caetani было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Caetani, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matteo Rosso Orsini в 1201 г. в местности магнано ин ривиира, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1216 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 38 лет.
